name: img-review
description: Annotate static images and app screenshots, then turn visual feedback into image or code changes.

interface.shortDescription: Mark up images and turn comments into changes.
interface.longDescription: Automatically activates for image, screenshot, design, or Appshot review requests and opens a local annotation canvas directly in the visible Codex in-app Browser. Codex can consume the saved structured feedback, edit the source image or UI code, verify the result, and prepare a commit.
defaultPrompt: Open Img Review in the in-app Browser.
Review these image versions and prepare revisions.
